why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:custom_click_action must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not UI behavior, command execution, interaction readiness, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 8, official body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Configuration table has no serverbound mapping for packet id 0x08.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
